description: You are a junior robotics engineer prototyping a differential-drive robot in Webots. Construct a physically valid two-wheeled robot from scratch in the current empty arena. The robot must be a Robot node with a Box-shaped body (including boundingObject) and a mass of 0.5 kg. It must feature two wheels, each configured as a HingeJoint containing a RotationalMotor and a Cylinder-shaped Solid endpoint with its own boundingObject and Physics. The motors must be named exactly 'left_motor' and 'right_motor'. Include a DistanceSensor named 'front_sensor' as a child of the robot. Ensure the WorldInfo.basicTimeStep is 32 or less. Save the completed world to /home/ga/Desktop/my_robot.wbt.
